entry_rule: first TRUE day of the current signal streak, enter next trading day's open
exit_model: price stop uses intraday low; gap below stop exits at open; scanner FALSE exits next trading day's open

summary.description: Initial stop is signal-day Low10. While holding, stop only moves up when the latest Low10 rises.
Initial stop is signal-day Low20. This matches the current Suggested Stop idea.
Low20 with a half-ATR buffer, intended to reduce small whipsaw stop-outs.
HHV20 minus 2.5 x ATR20, trailed upward only.
Uses MA50 as the price stop, trailed upward only. This is slower but often less noisy.
No intraday price stop. Exit only when the scanner signal turns FALSE or max holding is reached.
